description_for_human: Browse Lanos Logic AI automation services, case studies, and industries. Submit contact inquiries.
description_for_model: Lanos Logic is a strategic AI automation company (Chicago IL + UK) building AI agents, voice AI, document automation, process automation, vector database (RAG) solutions, mobile apps, and analytics platforms. Industries: marketing, sales, e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, logistics, education, professional services, manufacturing, US government, pharmaceutical, life sciences, legal. Key results: 300% capacity increase, 85% processing time reduction, 42% higher conversion rates. Tech: Claude AI, Make.com, AirTable, GoHighLevel, Twilio, VectorShift, VAPI, Flutter, Stripe. MCP endpoint (JSON-RPC 2.0, protocol 2024-11-05): https://lanos-logic.com/mcp — 7 tools: list_services, get_service, list_case_studies, get_case_study, list_industries, get_company_info, submit_inquiry. Contact: hello@lanos-logic.com, +1 (518) 864 3528.
